items.claim: Tommy McMillan has a clear advantage in wrestling over Alberto Montes.
items.quote: Tommy McMillan does have a clear advantage and the wrestling.

items.claim: Alberto Montes is a submission specialist who is dangerous with darce chokes.
items.quote: He is a bit of a specialist. Obviously, he's very, you know, he spans the same couple submissions. He's a dar demon for a reason

items.claim: Alberto Montes has a weak chin on the feet.
items.quote: I do worry about his chin on the feet.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan's recent performance against Manolo Zucchini was sloppy and lacked technical quality.
items.quote: you watch the fight back and like holy [ __ ] that was a hot mess to say the least. That was some sloppy ass fighting right there.

items.claim: Jose Delgado has a significant 4-inch reach advantage and a 5-inch height advantage over Austin Bashi.
items.quote: 4-inch reach advantage, switch stance versus unorthodox, and he's gonna have a significant 5 inch height advantage as well.

items.claim: Jose Delgado has a 50% takedown defense rate.
items.quote: you look down here, you see a 50% takedown defense.

items.claim: Austin Bashi's previous loss to Christian Rodriguez was primarily due to a cardio issue caused by over-exertion early in the fight.
items.quote: he slowed down going he busted his logo going on too early. Pause. And then he ended up losing a fight or a decision overall to Crod

items.claim: Soon-kyung Co has a history of being knocked out on the regional scene due to his karate-style, hands-down approach.
items.quote: He has this karate style handsdown approach. He has been knocked out for it multiple times on the regional scene
